query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.status,
  e.createdAt,
  mp.name as packageName,
  mp.monthlyPrice,
  l.name as studentName,
  l.phone,
  l.email
FROM enrollments e
LEFT JOIN membershipPackages mp ON e.packageId = mp.id
LEFT JOIN leads l ON e.leadId = l.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
